title: CSBC Prohibition Constable, Jail Warden Admit Card 2026
short_information: Central Selection Board of Constable CSBC has released the advertisement Bihar Police Post of Prohibition Constable, Jail Warder & Mobile Squad Constable. (Advt. No. 03/2025). Those Candidates Are Enrolled with Vacancy Can Download the Admit Card. For other information related to Bihar Police Post of Prohibition Constable, Jail Warder & Mobile Squad Constable. (Advt. No. 03/2025) recruitment like age limit, qualification, pay scale and all other information read the advertisement and then apply. Central Selection Board of Constable CSBC CSBC Bihar Police Prohibition Constable, Jail Warder & Mobile Squad Constable Recruitment 2025 Bihar Police Prohibition Constable Advt No. : 03/2025 Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC / EWS / Other State : 100/- SC / ST : 100/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or Pay Offline Fee Payment Through E Challan Mode Only CSBC Bihar Police Prohibition Constable, Jai Warder & Other Post Recruitment 2025:
eligibility: Prohibition Constable 1603 10+2 Inter Exam Passed from Any Recognized Board in India. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification Jail Warden 2417 10+2 Inter Exam Passed from Any Recognized Board in India. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification Mobile Squad Contable 108 10+2 Inter Exam Passed from Any Recognized Board in India. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification Bihar Police Post of Prohibition Constable, Jail Warder & Mobile Squad Constable. (Advt. No. 03/2025) Recruitment : Physical Eligibility Category Male Female Height 165 CMS 155 CMS Chest 81-86 CMS Not Available Running 1.6 Km in 7 Minutes 1 Km in 7 Minutes High Jump 3 Feet 6 Inch 2 Feet 6 Inch Long Jump 10 Feet 7 Feet Gola Fek 16 Pond Gola Through 14 Feet 12 Pond Gola Through 08 Feet

text_sections.section: How to Fill : Bihar Police Prohibition Constables Operator Online Form 2025
text_sections.content: Central Selection Board of Prohibition Constables (Operator) in Bihar Police (Advt. No. 03/2025) . Candidate Can Apply Between 06/10/2025 to 05/11/2025 | Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in Bihar Police CSBC Latest 03/2025 Recruitment Online Form 2025. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. | If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. | Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
